testcase.name: getBirthDateTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "Not available" Verifying that "Not available" matches the expected pattern ""?Not\s+available[.!"]*" ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "Not available" Checking whether getBirthDate( ) returns a String matching "Not available" ~> "Not available" (true) ✓ ----------------------------------------------------- Comparing the return value of the getter to the value of the attribute after setting a new value directly (ignoring the visibility modifier): ----------------------------------------------------- Assigning value "15.12.2041" to private String birthDate Checking whether getBirthDate( ) returns a String matching "15.12.2041" ~> "15.12.2041" (true) ✓

testcase.name: checkPersonIDNumberTests
testcase.system-out: Calling new PersonID( ) Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "030771-118P" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "011000+732A" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "060802A391E" ) returns true ~> true (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "150504+835Nq" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "240302-238" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "28060A765V" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓ Checking whether checkPersonIDNumber( "040120)1402" ) returns false ~> false (true) ✓

testcase.name: setPersonIDTests
testcase.error: dev.m3s.maeaettae.jreq.TargetException: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.length()" because "personID" is null @ dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.PersonID.checkPersonIDNumber(PersonID.java:34) at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.PersonIDTests.setPersonIDTests(PersonIDTests.java:68) Caused by: java.lang.NullPointerException: Cannot invoke "String.length()" because "personID" is null at dev.m3s.programming2.homework2.PersonIDTests.setPersonIDTests(PersonIDTests.java:68)
testcase.system-out:
Calling new PersonID( ) Calling setPersonID( "200708-5755" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "20.07.1908" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "131218+869R" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "13.12.1818" ✓ Calling setPersonID( "251008A270Y" ) Verifying that "Ok" matches the expected pattern ""?Ok[.!"]*" ✓ Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "25.10.2008" ✓
Verifying that calling setPersonId with null argument returns "Invalid birthday!", and that the birthDate is not changed: Reading the value of private String birthDate ~> "25.10.2008" Calling setPersonID( null )
